evidence_spans.span: Three earlier cache dispatches relied on handwritten release marks
authority for an offline release stayed unresolved
aid post has no cold-weather dressings left
regional coordinator required to resolve the offline-release authority by 10:00 tomorrow
Three prior dispatches already used the same substitute mark
road crew starts the closure in forty minutes
Limit it to the listed cache and keep the coordinator's 10:00 decision
do not turn this into a general permission
